F35 Words in rule 31.12 omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(13)(b) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### The central index of judgments registered under rule 31.11 E+W


31.13. The central index of judgments registered under rule 31.11 will be kept by the principal registry.


### Decision on recognition of a judgment only E+W


31.14. —(1) Where an application is made seeking recognition of a judgment only, the provisions of rules 31.8 and 31.9 apply to that application as they do to an application for registration for enforcement.


(2) Where the court orders that the judgment should be recognised, the court officer will serve a copy of the order on each party as soon as practicable.


(3) A sealed order of the court will constitute notification that the judgment has been recognised under F36 ... Article 24 of the 1996 Hague convention F37 ....


(4) The sealed order shall indicate —


Textual Amendments


F36 Words in rule 31.14(3) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(14)(a) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)

metadata.title: Part 31 — Registration of Orders under the Council Regulation, the Civil Partnership (Jurisdiction and Recognition of Judgments) Regulations 2005 and under the Hague Convention 1996
